sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check initial state from history
if history:
    init_frame = history[0].frame
    init_ascii = init_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    print("Initial right side bar rows:")
    for r in [33, 39, 45]:
        print(f"  {r}: {init_ascii[r][35:56]}")
    print("\nInitial left side bar rows:")
    for r in [33, 39, 45]:
        print(f"  {r}: {init_ascii[r][5:26]}")
else:
    print("No history")

# Check current state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nCurrent right side bar rows:")
for r in [33, 39, 45]:
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][35:56]}")

# Try clicking on the blue square at bottom left
# The blue square is at cols 7-15, rows 54-62
# Let's click on the yellow dots inside it (rows 57-59, cols 8-9)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 8}])
print(f"\nBlue square click: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check what changed
if previous_frame:
    prev_ascii = previous_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    for r in range(64):
        if prev_ascii[r] != ascii_lines[r]:
            print(f"Row {r} changed:")
            print(f"  Before: {prev_ascii[r]}")
            print(f"  After:  {ascii_lines[r]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
